_publications._publicationTitle: A machine learning classifier trained on cancer transcriptomes detects NF1 inactivation signal in glioblastoma.

_contextSnippet: Eight other samples had similar or less NF1 signal than the U87-MG NF1-low control (H5M, LNA, YXL, VVN, R7K, TRM, UNY, W31)
details: Used as NF1-low control with similar or less NF1 signal than 8 GBM samples (H5M, LNA, YXL, VVN, R7K, TRM, UNY, W31)
